## Sample
theme: midnight
> 30s, unscored, reveal, timer-manual

### (title) CFC 2026 Adult Quiz
image: data:image/png;base64,
sub: Welcome — get your team ready
We'll walk through the new format and the question types, then begin.

### (title) A New Format This Year
sub: We are introducing a new Quiz format!
The most significant aspect of today’s Quiz model is that every team will receive the identical set of questions.
By implementing this change, we aim to provide an equal platform for all participants to demonstrate their knowledge and quizzing abilities.
We will outline the specific logistics involved in the model. 

### (title) A New Format This Year
sub: We are introducing a new Quiz format!
We appreciate your patience and ask for your full cooperation throughout the event.
Instead of being shared out loud, responses must be recorded on a designated answer card.
Detailed guidelines for each specific round will be provided.

### (title) Sample — To Showcase
sub: The next two questions are just demos
These showcase each format — participants do not have to answer.

### (title) Format · Multiple Choice
sub: Choose ALL the options that apply
You have 30 seconds for each question.
Write only the LETTERS of the correct options — not the words.
For this sample you would write B, D — not John, Peter.
Full points only if you select every correct option.

### Who were the disciples present at the Transfiguration of Jesus?
< Matthew | *John | Mark | *Peter

### (title) Format · Fill in the Blanks
sub: One answer per blank, each on its own line
Write legibly — spelling must be accurate.
Each correct blank is worth 10 points.
This sample has 3 blanks, so 30 points are possible.
You have 30 seconds.

### (title) DOs & DON'Ts
image: data:image/jpeg;base64,

### In the ____ was the Word, and the ____ was with God, and the Word was ____.
< beginning, Word, God

## Trial
> 30s, 10pts, unscored, reveal, timer-manual

### (title) Trial Round
sub: Two practice questions to get you familiar
We'll show points so you can see how the scoreboard works,
but the trial does not count toward your final score.

### What mountain(s) were designated for the pronouncing of the blessings and the curses upon Israel?
< Mount Nebo | *Mount Gerizim | Mount Hor | *Mount Ebal

### And when he comes, he will ____ the world concerning sin and ____ and ____.
< convict, righteousness, judgment
> 30pts

### (title) Audience Question
sub: This one's for everyone watching
Please raise your hand if you wish to answer, and do not call out.
Wait to be called upon by the Quiz Conductor.
Once called upon, please stand in your spot, and a microphone will be passed to you.
You will have only one attempt to provide your answer.

### In John 17, Jesus prays to His Father for those the Father has given him. What does Jesus say He has given them, which caused the world to hate them?
< The glory that you have given me | *Your word | The Holy Spirit | My peace

### (leaderboard) Scoreboard

## Round 1
> 30s, 10pts, unscored, reveal, timer-manual

### (title) Round 1 · Multiple Choice
sub: Choose ALL the options that apply
Four questions, 30 seconds each.
Write only the LETTERS of the correct options — not the words.
Full points only if you select every correct option.

### How did Paul address the believers in Ephesus in his letter?
< The beloved of Christ | *The saints | To the brothers in Christ | *Are faithful in Christ Jesus | All the above | None of the above

### According to the book of Deuteronomy which feast(s) are the Israelites required to keep?
< *Unleavened Bread | *Weeks | Atonement | *Booths | All of the above | None of the above

### In John 17, Jesus lifts up His eyes to heaven and addresses the Father. What is the very first clause He speaks?
< Father, glorify your Son that the Son may glorify you. | *Father, the hour has come. | Father, I have manifested your name to the people. | Father, keep them in your name.

### Which chapter(s) in the book of Deuteronomy pronounce curses for disobedience?
< Chapter 25 | Chapter 26 | *Chapter 27 | *Chapter 28 | All of the above | None of the above

### What is the list of things that Paul asks believers to put away? Select all options that apply.
< *All bitterness | *Wrath and anger | *Clamor and slander | *All malice
> additional

### Jesus knows whom He has chosen, but that Scripture must be fulfilled, he quotes Old Testament to describe the betrayal. What was the quote?
< He who dipped his hand in the dish with me has betrayed me. | My close friend in whom I trusted has lifted up his hand against me. | *He who ate my bread has lifted his heel against me. | The one who shared my table has turned his back upon me.
> additional

### (title) Audience Question
sub: This one's for everyone watching
Please raise your hand if you wish to answer, and do not call out.
Wait to be called upon by the Quiz Conductor.
Once called upon, please stand in your spot, and a microphone will be passed to you.
You will have only one attempt to provide your answer.

### Through whom is the 'manifold wisdom of God' now made known to the rulers and authorities in the heavenly places? Select all options that apply.
< *The church | The Spirit | Holy apostles and prophets | The Word of God

### (leaderboard) Scoreboard

## Round 2
> 30s, 10pts, unscored, reveal, timer-manual

### (title) Round 2 · Fill in the Blanks
sub: One answer per blank, each on its own line
Four questions; timers run 30–45 seconds.
Write legibly — spelling must be accurate.
Each correct blank is worth 10 points.

### Jesus said to him, "The one who has bathed does not need to ____, except for his feet, but is completely ____. And you are ____, but ____ every one of you."
< wash, clean, clean, not
> 45s, 40pts

### And he came and preached ____ to you who were far off and ____ to those who were near.
< peace, peace
> 20pts

### To put off your old self, which belongs to your former ____ of life and is corrupt through ____ desires.
< manner, deceitful
> 20pts

### You have declared today that the Lord is your God, and that you will ____ in his ____, and keep his statutes and his commandments and his rules, and will ____ his ____.
< walk, ways, obey, voice
> 45s, 40pts

### Beware lest you say in your heart, "My ____ and the ____ of my hand have gotten me this ____."
< power, might, wealth
> 30pts, additional

### He who is a ____ ____ and not a ____, who does not own the sheep, sees the wolf coming and leaves the sheep and flees, and the wolf snatches them and scatters them.
< hired, hand, shepherd
> 30pts, additional

### (title) Audience Question
sub: This one's for everyone watching
Please raise your hand if you wish to answer, and do not call out.
Wait to be called upon by the Quiz Conductor.
Once called upon, please stand in your spot, and a microphone will be passed to you.
You will have only one attempt to provide your answer.

### John 14:26 But the ____, the Holy Spirit, whom the Father will send in my name, he will teach you all things and bring to your ____ all that I have said to you.
< Helper, remembrance

### (leaderboard) Scoreboard

## Round 3
> 60s, 20pts, unscored, reveal, timer-manual

### (title) Round 3 · Memory Verses
sub: From the memory verses you were given
Four questions, 90 seconds each, 20 points — no partial credit.
The verse must be word-perfect (punctuation aside), with the correct Book, chapter and verse.
Write legibly.

### Complete the memory verse — write the Book, chapter and verse.
I have said these things to you ______
< John 16:33  I have said these things to you, that in me you may have peace. In the world you will have tribulation. But take heart; I have overcome the world.
> 90s

### Write the scripture verse Ephesians 4:1-2.
< Ephesians 4:1-2  I therefore, a prisoner for the Lord, urge you to walk in a manner worthy of the calling to which you have been called, 2. with all humility and gentleness, with patience, bearing with one another in love.
> 90s

### Complete the memory verse — write the Book, chapter and verse.
You shall give to him freely, and your ______
< Deuteronomy 15:10  You shall give to him freely, and your heart shall not be grudging when you give to him, because for this the Lord your God will bless you in all your work and in all that you undertake.
> 90s

### Complete the memory verse — write the Book, chapter and verse.
Therefore be imitators of ______
< Ephesians 5:1-2  Therefore be imitators of God, as beloved children. 2. And walk in love, as Christ loved us and gave himself up for us, a fragrant offering and sacrifice to God.
> 90s

### Write the scripture verse Deuteronomy 26:18.
< Deuteronomy 26:18  And the Lord has declared today that you are a people for his treasured possession, as he has promised you, and that you are to keep all his commandments.
> 90s, additional

### Write the scripture verse John 10:27-28.
< John 10:27-28  My sheep hear my voice, and I know them, and they follow me. 28. I give them eternal life, and they will never perish, and no one will snatch them out of my hand.
> 90s, additional

### (title) Audience Question
sub: This one's for everyone watching
Please raise your hand if you wish to answer, and do not call out.
Wait to be called upon by the Quiz Conductor.
Once called upon, please stand in your spot, and a microphone will be passed to you.
You will have only one attempt to provide your answer.

### Recite John 15:5.
< John 15:5 I am the vine; you are the branches. Whoever abides in me and I in him, he it is that bears much fruit, for apart from me you can do nothing.
> 30s

### (leaderboard) Scoreboard

## Round 4
> 15s, 10pts, unscored, auto-transition, timer-manual

### (title) Round 4 · Rapid Fire
sub: Four quick questions — 10 seconds each
The next question follows automatically as soon as the timer ends
All the answers are revealed together after the round.
10 points per correct answer. Write legibly.

### In John 12, the Pharisees said to one another, "You see that you are gaining nothing. Look, the ____ has gone after him."
< world
> 10s

### In Ephesians 6:12, how many distinct categories of spiritual opposition does Paul list that we wrestle against? (Provide the number of categories, the categories are not required)
< 4
> 10s

### According to Deuteronomy 24:21, When you gather the grapes of your vineyard, you shall not strip it afterward. It shall be for whom?
< the sojourner, the fatherless, and the widow
> 10s

### According to Deuteronomy 4:41-43, which city or cities were set apart to the east of the Jordan for refuge for Reubenites, Gadites, and Manassites?
< Bezer, Ramoth, Golan
> 10s

### According to Jesus in John 13:8, if He does not wash Peter, Peter has no ____ with Him.
< share
> 10s, additional

### How many people are explicitly named in the book of Ephesians? (Provide the number, the name(s) are not required)
< 2 — Paul, Tychicus
> 10s, additional

### (title) Answers.

### (reveal-answers) Round 4 — The Answers
> 7s, loop-enabled

### (title) Audience Question
sub: This one's for everyone watching
Please raise your hand if you wish to answer, and do not call out.
Wait to be called upon by the Quiz Conductor.
Once called upon, please stand in your spot, and a microphone will be passed to you.
You will have only one attempt to provide your answer.

### In John 11, in the narrative about the death of Lazarus, which disciple said to the fellow disciples, "Let us also go, that we may die with him"?
< Thomas, called the Twin
> 30s, reveal, manual-transition

### (leaderboard) Scoreboard

## Round 5
> 45s, unscored, reveal, timer-manual

### (title) Round 5 · The Final Round
sub: Four questions, different formats
45 seconds each. Write legibly.
Match the columns · arrange in order · identify the Book & chapter · name the places.

### (title) Format · Match the Columns
sub: Write each Letter with the Number it matches
Answer format — e.g. X-7, Y-8.
10 points for each correct match. 45 seconds. Write legibly.

### Match the columns — write each Letter with the Number it matches (e.g. X-9).
< A. Bezer -> 3) Designated refuge city on the high tableland wilderness belonging to the Reubenites. | B. Jotbathah -> 4) Explicitly described in the travel itinerary as a "land with brooks of water." | C. Zeboiim -> 1) The fourth city listed in the exact sequence of historical locations completely destroyed by brimstone. | D. The oak of Moreh -> 2) Specific location where the visual object lesson of Mount Gerizim and Mount Ebal takes place.
> 40pts

### (title) Format · Put in Order
sub: Arrange in the correct order
Write the letters in the correct order.
10 points for each phrase in the right place. 45 seconds. Write legibly.

### Arrange in the correct order the "one" attributes in Ephesians 4:4-6, where Paul writes, "There is one … one baptism, 6 one God and Father of all, who is over all and through all and in all."
< Spirit | grace | Lord | body | hope | faith | peace
answer: D, A, E, C, F  (body, Spirit, hope, Lord, faith)
> 50pts

### (title) Format · Identify the Book & Chapter
sub: Name the Book & chapter for each verse
10 points for each correct answer. 45 seconds. Write legibly.

### Identify the Book & chapter for each verse.
1. urge you to walk in a manner worthy of the calling
2. Therefore I command you, You shall set apart three cities
3. A new commandment I give to you
4. you can perceive my insight into the mystery of Christ
< Ephesians 4, Deuteronomy 19, John 13, Ephesians 3
> 40pts

### Every place on which the sole of your foot treads shall be yours. Your territory shall be from the wilderness to the ____, and from the ____, the ____ ____, to the western ____.
< Lebanon, River, river, Euphrates, sea
> 50pts

### What town am I? I am described to be in a "region near the wilderness."
< Ephraim
> 30s, 10pts, additional

### In John 14, what is the reason Jesus gives when he says to the disciples, "you also will live"?
< Because they abide in Him | Because they obey His commandments | Because He is sending the Holy Spirit | Because He is the way, the truth, and the life | *None of the above
> 30s, 10pts, additional

### (title) Audience Question
sub: This one's for everyone watching
Please raise your hand if you wish to answer, and do not call out.
Wait to be called upon by the Quiz Conductor.
Once called upon, please stand in your spot, and a microphone will be passed to you.
You will have only one attempt to provide your answer.

### In Ephesians 6, which piece of armor is the fourth item mentioned in Paul's sequential list in verses 14-17?
< The shield of faith
> 30s, 10pts

### (leaderboard) Scoreboard

## Tie-Breaker
> 30s, 10pts, unscored, reveal, timer-manual

### (title) Tie-Breaker Round
sub: Only if teams are tied
Used only for the tied teams the conductor names — not everyone.
We won't say which place is being decided.
Five questions, 30 seconds each.

### What titles does Paul give himself in the book of Ephesians? Select all that apply.
< *an apostle of Christ Jesus by the will of God | an apostle of Christ Jesus by command of God our Savior and of Christ Jesus our hope | *a prisoner of Christ Jesus on behalf of you Gentiles | *a prisoner for the Lord | *an ambassador in chains | a teacher of the Gentiles in faith and truth

### According to Deuteronomy 11:16-17, which of the following is NOT one of the outcomes of the anger of the Lord if the Israelites turn aside and serve other gods and worship them?
< Shut up the heavens | Land will yield no fruit | *Destroyed by enemies | No rain | None of the above

### Which of these phrases are found in the book of Ephesians? Select all that apply.
< gospel of God | gospel of the kingdom | gospel of Jesus Christ, the Son of God | *gospel of peace | gospel of the grace of God | *gospel of your salvation
> 20pts

### (title) Format · Number Question
sub: Write only the number
Write only the number, you do not need to include references.
You have 30 seconds. The Lowest closest answer gets a point. 

### How many times does the phrase "abide in me" appear in John 15?
< 4

### How many times does the phrase "in Christ" appear in Ephesians 1?
< 6
